name: How much is my neck injury from work accident worth in a settlement Boise?
description: $15k-$50k typical in Idaho; factors severity, wages.

mainEntity.name: How much is my neck injury from work accident worth in a settlement Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: $15k-$50k typical in Idaho; factors severity, wages.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Idaho workers' comp neck settlements average $15k-$50k, higher for surgery or permanent issues.** Amounts depend on medical costs, lost wages (2/3 average weekly), disability rating.[5] Key factors: Severity like herniation/fusion; time off work; future care needs. No fixed average; Utah medians around $200k for back/neck but vary.[9] Calculate via attorney using state max limits. Free consult estimates value.
